attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SM.POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD_KEY AS POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD_KEY, 
WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,     
SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT,              
DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG,              
ACTIVE_FLG,                    
SRC_CREATED_DTM,               
DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,             
SRC_CREATED_PROCESS_NAME,      
SRC_UPDATED_DTM,               
DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,             
SRC_UPDATED_PROCESS_NAME,      
SRC_RPTD_QUOTE_NUM,            
SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM,         
SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,        
WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
MATCHING_MTHD_FOR_TAGGING_NAME,
SRC_RPTD_ERP_SO_HEADER_ID,     
SRC_RPTD_ERP_QUOTE_HEADER_ID,  
SRC_RPTD_REVENUE_SRC_CD,       
WI.SALES_MOTION_CD,               
SPLIT_PCT,                     
START_TV_DT,                   
END_TV_DT,                     
PO_EXISTS_FLG,                 
PO_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,          
PO_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,            
QUOTE_EXISTS_FLG,              
QUOTE_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,       
QUOTE_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,         
MULTIPLE_SALES_MOTION_FLG,     
LINKED_TO_MULTIPLE_SOL_FLG,    
SOFTWARE_OR_SERVICE_FLG,       
SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,        
ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,   
MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,          
RU_REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,    
RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC,
WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
WI.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD WI
INNER JOIN
$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD SM
ON
WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=SM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND WI.SALES_MOTION_CD=SM.SALES_MOTION_CD 
AND WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
